team_description: A team focused on institutional design, public policy, and governance. It combines historical statesmen with modern advisors for policy analysis and governance planning.

members.name: Abraham Lincoln
members.description: Led institutional reconstruction in crisis while balancing values and pragmatism.

members.name: Alexander Hamilton
members.description: A key architect of modern fiscal and state capacity institutions.

members.name: Montesquieu
members.description: Known for separation of powers and constitutional checks and balances.

members.name: Wang Anshi
members.description: A Song reformer skilled in systemic institutional and fiscal reform.

members.name: Zhang Juzheng
members.description: A Ming reform statesman focused on administrative efficiency and fiscal discipline.

members.name: Political Analyst
members.description: Provides modern political-structure and policy-game analysis for strategy support.

members.name: Legal Scholar
members.description: Evaluates policy options through legal theory and institutional compliance.

members.name: Economist
members.description: Assesses policy impact on allocation, incentives, and long-term growth.
